headline: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Announces Collaboration with Nvidia on Robotics Solutions
summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) is one of the 7 Cheapest AI Data Center Stocks to Buy Now. On March 17, 2026, NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) reported robotics solutions jointly with Nvidia, combining Nvidia Holoscan Sensor Bridge with NXP SoCs for sensor fusion, machine vision, and motor control. The corporation noted savings in component size, footprint, […]
